info.title: Thermometer - Hygrometer
info.description:
The thermometer is used to obtain the temperature, pressure and humidity of the current GPS positioning area.When you go out, you can check all the information about the temperature and get prepared in advance!
 
Thermometer is not only a temperature app but also a hygrometer. Sometimes when you feel your face and body are very dry, you can refer to the humidity value displayed on the Thermometer to decide whether to open the humidifier.
 
Use Cases:
As a thermometer, hygrometer, or a fishing barometer for almost all outdoor activities, such as hiking, fishing and climbing.
 
Main Features:
- Thermometer: Get the current outdoor temperature
- Hygrometer: Humidity percentage display
- Barometer: Air pressure and weather display
- Discomfort index: Current environmental comfort display
Through accurate GPS positioning, you can directly obtain the temperature and humidity of the current area, it is no longer afraid that the temperature and humidity will change too much and affect your health.

Application Details:
1. Temperature is displayed in Celsius and Fahrenheit.
2. The hygrometer shows real-time humidity by percentage.
3. The barometer displays the current barometric pressure in Kpa.
4. Automatically update the reference temperature, humidity and air pressure in the nearest weather station.
 
This is an easy-to-use thermometer app. Just this one, you can get a hygrometer, thermometer and a fishing barometer.
 
Tips: Internet connection and GPS positioning is required to display temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure.We can not measure the indoor temperature and humidity.
info.summary: A useful Thermometer to obtain the current area temperature and humidity

info.title: Microphone-​Voice Amplifier
info.description:
Microphone-Voice Amplifier: Your Professional Sound Boost
Turn your Android device into a powerful, real-time voice amplifier and Bluetooth microphone. Whether you need a hearing amplifier for clearer conversations, a live microphone to speaker for announcements, presentations, meetings, and guiding tours, or a high-quality audio recorder, this all-in-one sound amplifier app is your versatile solution. It features advanced noise reduction, flexible background play, and a variety of microphone styles to choose from.

Use our Microphone Amplifier, you can get
- Multiple Microphone styles to pick up
- Easy switch to Bluetooth Microphone Amplifier
- Build-in high-quality live audio recorder
- Live sound amplification with noise reduction
- Keep the amplifier running in the background or with the screen off

🎯 Why Choose Our Microphone Amplifier?
• Live Voice & Sound Amplification with Noise Reduction:
Experience crystal-clear, real-time (live sound) enhancement. The built-in noise reduction feature minimizes background interference, ensuring your voice is projected crisply. It's more than a simple sound booster; it's a professional audio amplifier device.
• Bluetooth Microphone Amplifier:
Use your phone as a wireless Bluetooth microphone for speakers. Perfect for presentations, teaching, meetings, and guiding tours, providing stable wireless audio transmission.
• Hearing Assistance & Clear Listening:
Functions as a practical listening amplifier and hearing amplifier app. The noise reduction technology helps you hear speech and sounds more clearly in noisy environments like restaurants or crowded places.
• Professional Audio Recorder:
Capture important moments, meetings, or creative ideas with the built-in high-quality live audio recorder.
• Customizable Sound with Multiple Microphone Styles:
Adjust settings and choose from various virtual microphone styles (e.g., studio, vocal boost, ambient) to create your ideal professional sound amplifier experience.

🌟 Key Features as Your Sound Amplifier Device:
✔ Live Sound & Microphone Amplifier: Real-time voice amplification with noise suppression for clear projection.
✔ Background Play Function: Keep the amplifier running while using other apps or with your screen off, perfect for extended events or personal listening.
✔ Multiple Microphone Styles: Select from different audio pickup patterns and styles to match your scenario (speech, singing, broadcasting).
✔ Bluetooth Speaker Connect: Seamlessly connect to any Bluetooth speaker or headset.
✔ Voice Recorder & Sound Recorder: Capture audio clearly with the integrated audio recorder.
✔ Sound Booster & Audio Booster: Enhance volume and clarity for any audio source.

📱 How to Use This Microphone Amplifier App in 3 Steps:
Connect your headphones or any Bluetooth speaker.
Launch the app, select your preferred microphone style, and tap start – your phone instantly becomes a live microphone.
Adjust the sound amplifier and noise reduction settings for clear listening or loud speaking. You can even switch to other apps while it runs in the background.

Ideal as a hearing device amplifier, microphone-to-speaker tool, or professional voice recorder, this sound amplifier device adapts to your needs. Its background play capability allows for uninterrupted use during long gatherings or personal listening sessions. It's the essential voice amplifier app for everyday clarity and versatile audio projects.
Use the Live Voice Amplifier now and transform your phone into a powerful, intelligent audio tool!

Disclaimer: This sound amplifier app is designed for audio enhancement, communication assistance, and personal use. It is not a certified medical hearing aid device. Please consult a healthcare professional for medical hearing issues.

Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/wirelessmicrophone-privacypoli/
Terms of user: https://sites.google.com/view/wirelessmicrophone-termsofuser/
You can contact us with: xiangdong.li.ldx@gmail.com
info.summary: A Bluetooth microphone and sound amplifier app for clear listening and speaking.

info.title: Voice Changer: AI Voice Change
info.description:
Welcome to Voice Changer, the great AI-powered voice transformation app designed for creativity and fun! Whether you're a content creator seeking professional voiceovers, a prankster planning hilarious voice jokes, or someone exploring AI voice technology, Voice Changer delivers tools to change voices effortlessly. With features like AI voice change & recorde and text-to-speech, this app opens up a world of possibilities for audio and video projects. Our intuitive interface ensures that anyone can achieve stunning results with just a few taps—no technical skills required. Plus, with strong privacy protections, your data stays safe while you create.

Key Features​
AI Voice Changer & Recorder: Record your voice in real-time and apply fun or professional effects. Switch between male or female voices instantly.
Text-to-Speech (TTS): Type text and convert it to natural-sounding speech using 100+ voice options. Ideal for videos, audiobooks, or language learning.
Audio File Changer: Select an audio file and change the voice using your selected effect. 
Video Voice Changer: Modify voices in your videos without affecting video quality. Good for dubbing or adding creative voice effects.
Favorites Collection: Save your best voice creations to a “Favorites” folder for quick access and easy management.
Share Functionality: Export and share audio or video files directly to social media, messaging apps.

Why Choose Voice Changer?​
Wide Voice Library: Provide over 100 voice options, our ever-growing library offers something for every scenario.
User-Friendly Design: Simple tools and a clean layout make voice editing accessible to everyone.

Ideal For​
Content creators adding voiceovers to videos, podcasts, or ads
Pranksters creating fake voice messages or funny clips
Social media users personalizing content with unique voices
Educators and students making engaging audio materials

Use Voice Changer Today!​
Join users who trust Voice Changer for AI voice innovation. Transform your sound now and start creating!
Disclaimer: Voice Changer uses AI for voice simulation. Results may vary, and users are encouraged to apply the tool responsibly and ethically.

Support:
For questions or suggestions, contact us at xiangdong.li.ldx@gmail.com
info.summary: Change your voice with AI. Record, share, and change voices for audio, video.

info.title: Aesthetic Wallpapers HD
info.description:
Transform your device with a vast collection of high-quality backgrounds HD. Our app provides a curated selection of aesthetic HD images that fit any style or mood. Whether you prefer minimalist designs or vibrant colors, you can find the perfect look for your home and lock screen. 🖼️

Explore an extensive library of live wallpaper options that bring your screen to life with motion and depth. Our collection HD is updated regularly to ensure you have access to the latest trends in digital art and photography. Each image is optimized for various screen resolutions to provide a crisp and clear visual experience.

Save your favorite HD images directly to your gallery or set them as your background in just a few taps. Our aesthetic studio approach focuses on providing unique and beautiful HD visuals that stand out from the crowd. Enjoy a seamless browsing experience designed to help you find your next look in seconds. ✨

Key features include:
- High-quality aesthetic  backgrounds
- Interactive live wallpaper selection
- Diverse collection  for all tastes
- Simple interface for quick updates

Download today and start personalizing your screen with stunning visuals.
info.summary: Get aesthetic HD wallpapers and live backgrounds for a beautiful screen.

info.title: AI Photo & Video Filters
info.description:
Discover aiphoto, the cutting-edge AI photo and video editor that revolutionizes your creative process. Immerse yourself in a world where advanced AI technology seamlessly transforms ordinary moments into extraordinary visual masterpieces. Designed for both enthusiasts and professionals, aiphoto provides intuitive, powerful tools to enhance your photos and videos, enabling you to express your unique vision with unprecedented ease and precision. Experience the future of digital artistry and redefine your content with our smart AI photo capabilities!

Unleash unparalleled creativity with aiphoto's vast array of trending AI photo filters and innovative features. Our easy photo enhancer AI tools make it simple to achieve stunning results, turning your ideas into captivating visuals. Dive into specific transformations tailored for every occasion:
   AI Dress-Up & Style Transformations: Instantly try on new outfits and styles with realistic AI clothing changes.
   Festive Holiday Filters: Celebrate special moments with exclusive AI Christmas, New Year, and Halloween filters that bring seasonal magic to your photos.
   Fun Social Image Generation: Create unique, attention-grabbing social pictures and avatars perfect for sharing across all platforms.
   Professional Photography Styles: Generate high-quality, studio-grade images for every milestone. Experience specialized AI filters for elegant maternity shoots, breathtaking wedding portraits, sophisticated studio aesthetics, and the timeless "old money" look. Our photo enhancer AI studio brings professional touches to your fingertips.

But aiphoto's power extends beyond static images. Elevate your storytelling with dynamic AI video capabilities that breathe life into your visual content. Transform and animate your videos with ease:
   AI Picture to Video Converter: Convert your favorite photos into engaging, animated videos instantly, adding movement and narrative.
   Dynamic AI Dancing Videos: Watch your images come alive with fun and expressive  dancing animations.
   Video Filter Integration: Apply the same stunning  filters to your video clips for a consistent and polished look across all your media.

Aiphoto is more than just an app; it's your personal creative studio. Our commitment to innovation means regular updates, introducing new filters, features, and enhancements to keep your content fresh and ahead of the curve. With our advanced photo enhancer  HD technology, every creation boasts exceptional clarity and detail, ensuring your visuals always look professional. This powerful  photo tool empowers you to discover endless creative possibilities and produce content that truly stands out.

Ready to revolutionize your digital presence? Download aiphoto today and start your journey of creative transformation! Join a growing community of users who trust aiphoto for stunning -powered visuals. Unlock the full suite of premium features, including an ad-free experience, exclusive filters, and priority support, with an optional subscription. Try aiphoto free now and discover the ultimate  photo and video editing experience!
info.summary: Transform photos & videos with AI filters, enhance quality & create unique art
